# MonsieurData

> MonsieurData is the digital analytics practice of Dimitri Dries, a
> remote-first digital analytics developer. He builds measurement setups that
> teams can trust: analytics and tag management implementations (Google
> Analytics 4, Amplitude, Mixpanel, Google Tag Manager) across web and mobile
> apps, server-side tagging, Consent Mode v2, and BigQuery data pipelines. He
> is vendor-agnostic: the platform is chosen to fit the client, not the other
> way around.

## What is a digital analytics developer?

A digital analytics developer is the hands-on, technical counterpart to an
analytics consultant: someone who implements tracking plans, dataLayers,
analytics and tag management containers (GA4, Amplitude, Mixpanel, GTM),
mobile app tracking, server-side tagging and the data pipelines behind them,
rather than only advising on strategy.

## Services

- **Analytics Audit**: structured review of your analytics platform and tag
  management setup, data quality, consent and reporting, ending in a
  prioritised roadmap. (~2 weeks)
- **Implementation Sprint**: hands-on delivery of a tracking plan, analytics
  and tag management implementation (GA4, Amplitude, Mixpanel, GTM, web and
  server-side), mobile app tracking (Firebase, AppsFlyer & MMPs) and BigQuery
  pipelines, documented and handed over. (4-8 weeks)
- **Data Partner** (highest value): ongoing retainer where Dimitri works
  embedded in the client's team and tools for a fixed number of days per
  month, covering monitoring, data quality alerts and new tracking needs.

## Expertise

Tracking plans and dataLayer design, analytics platforms (Google Analytics 4,
Amplitude, Mixpanel), Google Tag Manager and server-side tagging, Consent
Mode v2 and CMP integration, GDPR-compliant measurement, mobile app tracking
(Firebase, AppsFlyer, mobile measurement partners), marketing pixels and
attribution, BigQuery, SQL, dbt / Dataform, Python, Looker Studio, Power BI,
marketing and app data models.

## How AI is used

Dimitri uses AI tools to speed up documentation, scaffolding and the
repetitive parts of a build. Architecture decisions, QA and judgment calls
stay with him: the work is AI-assisted, not AI-generated.

## Working model

Remote-first, working with marketing and product teams across Europe, the UK
and the US. Pricing is on demand: every engagement gets a fixed, itemised
proposal after a free intro call.
